posts.author: Theo (Theo)
posts.cookedHtml:
The goal of this feature is to be able to further customize charts texts to be able to make monday.com a “slide killer” by having “ready to screenshot” charts that can be put into a deck.
This could apply to : X and Y axis, the legend of the chart, the possibility to wrap up text on charts X and Y axis.
